sql: SELECT c.name AS tipo, a.project_key, a.labels, a.reporter, b.name AS proyecto, a.key AS clave, a.components AS componente, a.priority AS prioridad, a.status AS estado, a.customfield_11266 AS producto, a.customfield_11789 AS authorizedby, b.projectcategory_name AS categoria, SUBSTRING(a.created, 1, 10) AS creacion, SUBSTRING(a.updated, 1, 10) AS actualizacion, SUBSTRING(a.resolved, 1, 10) AS fechaResolucion, a.customfield_11788 AS fechaResolucionEsperada, a.customfield_11787 AS waiverSolicitados, a.assignee AS PersonaACaorgo, a.customfield_11784 AS razonDelBug, a.customfield_11773 AS whereWasdetected, a.customfield_10103 AS sprint, a.customfield_11798 AS TestExecutionSource, a.customfield_11759 AS ResultType, a.summary, a.parent_key, e.assignee AS parentAssignee, e.status AS parentStatus, a.customfield_10105 AS StoryPoints FROM prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issuetypes c INNER JOIN prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issues a ON (a.issuetype_id = c.id) INNER JOIN prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_projects b ON (a.project_id = b.id) INNER JOIN prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issuetypes d ON (a.issuetype_id = d.id) LEFT JOIN prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issues e ON (a.parent_key = e.key) WHERE a.status_dl = 'true'

CalculatedField.3d to expire: ifelse(fechaResolucionEsperada > now() AND fechaResolucionEsperada <= addDateTime(3, 'DD', now()), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.bugs creados en periodo: countIf(clave, tipo= 'Bug' AND creacion >= ${TENDFECHAINIC} AND creacion <= ${TENDFECHAFIN})
CalculatedField.DETECTED IN OTHER ENVS: ifelse(({DETECTED IN PRD} + {DETECTED IN QA} + {DETECTED IN UAT} + EMPTY) = 0, 1 , 0)
CalculatedField.DETECTED IN PRD: ifelse(contains(whereWasdetected, 'PRD') AND NOT (contains(whereWasdetected, 'PRD') AND isNotNull(labels) AND contains(labels, 'pruebasControladas') ), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.DETECTED IN UAT: ifelse(contains(whereWasdetected, 'UAT')  OR contains(whereWasdetected, 'Shared Testing') OR (contains(whereWasdetected, 'PRD') AND contains(labels, 'pruebasControladas')), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.Exp. between 2w to 4w since now: ifelse(fechaResolucionEsperada > addDateTime(15, 'DD', now())  AND fechaResolucionEsperada <= addDateTime(30, 'DD', now()), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.Exp. between 3d and 2w since now: ifelse(fechaResolucionEsperada > addDateTime(3, 'DD', now())  AND fechaResolucionEsperada <= addDateTime(15, 'DD', now()), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.historias cerradas en periodo: countIf(clave, tipo= 'Story' AND fechaResolucion >= ${fechaInicio} AND fechaResolucion <= ${fechaFin})
CalculatedField.PRD: ifelse(contains(whereWasdetected, 'PRD') AND NOT (contains(whereWasdetected, 'PRD') AND isNotNull(labels) AND contains(labels, 'pruebasControladas') ), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.RAW: {bugs creados en periodo}/{historias cerradas en periodo}
CalculatedField.sign-offs product: ifelse((tipo = 'Results' OR tipo = 'Test Plan' OR tipo = 'Partial sign-off') AND (ResultType = 'Successful' OR ResultType = 'Partially Successful' OR ResultType = 'Failed' OR ResultType = 'Canceled'), producto, 'EMPTY')
CalculatedField.status: ifelse(tipo='Bug', ifelse(estado='Done', 'COMPLETED BUG', 'INCOMPLETED BUG'), ifelse(tipo='Story', ifelse(estado = 'Done', 'COMPLETED STORIES', ifelse(estado='ON HOLD', 'INCOMPLETE STORIES ON HOLD',        estado = 'To Do' OR estado = 'In Progress', 'INCOMPLETE STORIES TODO AND WIP',  'INCOMPLETE STORIES')), ifelse(tipo='Technical Story', ifelse(estado='Done', 'COMPLETED TECHNICAL STORIES',  'INCOMPLETED TECHNICAL STORIES'), 'N/A' ) ) )
CalculatedField.TIME PERIOD: ifelse(    fechaResolucionEsperada <= now(),     'Expired',     ifelse(        fechaResolucionEsperada <= addDateTime(3, 'DD', now()),         '3 D to expire',         ifelse(            fechaResolucionEsperada > addDateTime(3, 'DD', now()) AND fechaResolucionEsperada <= addDateTime(15, 'DD', now()),             '3 D and 2 W to expire',             ifelse(                fechaResolucionEsperada > addDateTime(15, 'DD', now()) AND fechaResolucionEsperada <= addDateTime(30, 'DD', now()),                 '2 W and 4 W to expire',                 'More than 4 W to expire'            )        )    ))
CalculatedField.UAT: ifelse(contains(whereWasdetected, 'UAT')  OR contains(whereWasdetected, 'Shared Testing') OR (contains(whereWasdetected, 'PRD') AND contains(labels, 'pruebasControladas')), 1, 0)
CalculatedField.WAIVERS: ifelse(isNull(waiverSolicitados) OR waiverSolicitados = 0, 'WITHOUT WAIVER', ifelse(waiverSolicitados = 1, 'WITH 1 WAIVER', ifelse(waiverSolicitados = 2, 'WITH 2 WAIVERS', 'Error')))
